content.en:
"Eight Realms Supreme Learning!"

"Thirty-six Supreme Dimension Rule !!"

The Ice Leaf Realm Lord was really shocked by Ye Tian's strength, and the Eighth Realm was able to comprehend a supreme dimensional rule, which was already extremely good.

However, Ye Tian had comprehended the thirty-six supreme dimensional rules, which were much higher than many of the supreme dimensional rules comprehended by the ninth realm.

Other than that.

The Ice Leaf Realm Lord also felt that Ye Tian's physical strength was a little incredible, was this really the Eighth Realm?

She was also extremely powerful in the Ninth Realm, but at this moment, she actually felt tricky from Ye Tian.

"Ice Leaf Realm Lord, am I qualified to talk to you now?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Please come in!"

The main path of the Ice Leaf Realm.

Subsequently, Ye Tian and the Ice Leaf Realm Lord entered the Ice Leaf Ancient Abyss together.

Inside a palace.

The Ice Leaf Realm Lord asked, "Ye Heaven Realm Lord, did you come to me for something?"

Ye Tiandao: "I want to trade those multi-dimensional supreme fragments on the Ice Leaf Realm Lord's body. "

"I don't want to trade!" the Ice Leaf Realm Lord directly refused, "Although those fragments of multi-dimensional supreme things can't improve my strength, they can save my life, if I encounter a strong enemy, after swallowing it, my physical body is extremely powerful, and there are few people in the ninth realm who can break that physical strength!"

Ye Tiandao: "Ice Leaf Realm Lord, I can take that multi-dimensional supreme thing, and the strength of my physical body can indeed be increased to an incredible level, but the reaction will be very slow, my body will be hard, and my combat strength will decline seriously." It's true that the enemy can't break the defenses, but they can easily seal you away and wait for the power of the multidimensional supreme to run out. "

The Ice Leaf Realm Lord didn't refute, because it was true that during this time, there was indeed a Ninth Realm that relied on the strength of the multi-dimensional supreme thing to give the physical body, so as to attack and kill the enemy, but it was easily sealed by the enemy, and finally exhausted the fragment energy of the multi-dimensional supreme thing, and was killed by the enemy.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, even so, I still don't want to trade!"

The Ice Leaf Realm Lord said.

Ye Tian smiled and said, "Ice Leaf Realm Lord, I am only in the eighth realm now, if I want to break through to the ninth realm, I can break through at any time." If I break through to the ninth realm, how much will my strength increase? "

The Ice Leaf Realm Lord was shocked, it was true that Ye Tian of the Eighth Realm was so powerful, and he could indeed break through to the Ninth Realm at any time.

If Ye Tian wants to break through, he will soon be able to break through to the ninth realm, and his strength will definitely surpass her.

"I heard that the Ice Leaf Realm Lord has an enemy, if the Ice Leaf Realm Lord is willing to trade those multi-dimensional supreme object fragments to me, I am willing to help you, how about it?"

Ye Tian said.

The Ice Leaf Realm Lord was moved, if Ye Tian helped her, she was really expected to kill that enemy.

"However, aren't you afraid of the Peacock Realm Master?"

The Ice Leaf Realm Lord asked.

Her enemy had something to do with the Peacock Realm Lord, and took refuge in the Peacock Realm Lord, and was one of the three thugs under the command of the Peacock Realm Lord.

"Ice Leaf Realm Lord, if I break through to the Ninth Realm, I am sure that I will be able to match the Peacock Realm Lord in a short period of time. "

Ye Tian said.

"Okay, I agreed!" said the Ice Leaf Realm Lord.

Immediately, she took out the fragments of those multi-dimensional supreme things, "Ye Tian Realm Lord, these are all for you, but you need to make an oath to help me, otherwise I won't believe you!"

"No problem!"

Ye Tian immediately made an oath.

After the oath was made, the Ice Leaf Realm Lord handed over all these fragments of the multi-dimensional supreme object to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian retired.

......

Eighteenth dimension.

Eternal Star.

Ye Tian came here, swallowed some fragments of the multi-dimensional supreme thing, and then entered the Eternal Star, and began to absorb the energy of the Eternal Star to cultivate the Eternal Star Aperture.

Gradually, Ye Tian's Eternal Star Aperture cultivated to the consummation realm, condensed the Eternal Mark, and once again obtained a Supreme Domain Body Secret Technique—Eternal Imperishable!

The Eternal Immortality Supreme Body Secret Technique allowed him to ignore any injuries for a short period of time, and his recovery power was extremely terrifying.

"Go to the Space-Time Star!"

Ye Tian disarmed this copy body, condensed the other copy bodies again, and then went to the space-time star.

this day.

All of Ye Tian's three hundred and sixty-five star apertures were complete, which also made his supreme dimensional domain body reach the consummation realm.

Rumble!!!!!

At this moment, Ye Tian's connection with the three hundred and sixty-five multi-dimensional stars instantly skyrocketed a thousandfold.

Coupled with the thirty-six-fold supreme dimensional rules, as well as the soul will that had broken through to the seventeenth dimension, he was now in the eighth realm and had truly come to an end.

His gaze jumped to the dimension, looking at the three hundred and sixty-five multi-dimensional stars, and he had a realization in his heart.

The other Eighth Realms need to use a multi-dimensional star as the natal star before they can use the energy of the natal star to impact the ninth realm.

But he was different, he could directly devour the power of three hundred and sixty-five multi-dimensional stars, so as to condense his own supreme stars in his body, and thus step into the ninth realm.

In this way, even if those three hundred and sixty-five multi-dimensional stars were destroyed, his realm would not be lowered.

This is true freedom and detachment!

"It's time to go and hit the Ninth Realm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

The energy required to impact the Ninth Realm was too much, and the Yuanxu Sea was not suitable.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian kept searching, and finally found a suitable place in an area of the seventeenth dimension, he asked other replica bodies to patrol and guard, and one of his duplicate bodies began to impact the ninth realm.

Rumble!!!!

The supreme dimensional domain body connected the three hundred and sixty-five multi-dimensional stars, forcibly absorbing their energy, and the endless multidimensional (Li Zhao) star body energy poured into Ye Tian's body, gradually condensing into a black dot within the dimensional domain in the body.

This black dot is constantly expanding, and it is being conceived into a supreme astral body.

Coupled with the assistance of the thirty-six dimensional rules, the bottleneck of the ninth realm was directly shattered, his body began to transform, and his cultivation began to break through.

Due to the fact that Ye Tian's breakthrough movement was a bit big, some recent multi-dimensional lifeforms had come over, but Ye Tian's other copy bodies still possessed the ninth realm combat power, and they were easily driven away.

After all, there are not enough benefits, and these multi-dimensional beings don't want to fight hard.

Long years have passed.

this day.

The aura of the Ninth Realm diffused from Ye Tian's body.

"Breakthrough, the Ninth Realm !!"

Ye Tian felt that he was too powerful now, far beyond himself in the eighth realm, and he didn't know how powerful he was now.
